Key distinguishing features of the target:

- The pattern is: empty, filled, filled, empty, filled (reading left to right)
- All rows have the same pattern
- It has 3 vertical stripes of X's (columns 2-3 together and column 5)

A good description: "Three vertical stripes with a gap in the middle" or "Vertical pattern with columns 2-3 and 5 filled" or "Has an empty column between filled columns on the right side"

content.text: Expression: The grid with three vertical stripes where the middle stripe consists of two adjacent filled columns, separated by an empty column from a single filled column on the right edge.
